title: Curated Molecules for Quantum Chemistry
description: A collection of molecules suitable for VQE simulation at various difficulty levels

categories.title: Diatomic Molecules
categories.description: Simple two-atom molecules, ideal for learning VQE

molecules.name: Hydrogen
molecules.description: The simplest molecule. The hydrogen dimer is the 'Hello World' of quantum chemistry.
molecules.vqe_notes: Perfect for testing ansatze and optimizers. Exact with 4 qubits.

molecules.name: Lithium Hydride
molecules.description: Ionic bond character, important for solid-state physics.
molecules.vqe_notes: Good test of ionic bonding. Core electrons can be frozen.

molecules.name: Helium Hydride Ion
molecules.description: First molecule formed in the universe after the Big Bang.
molecules.vqe_notes: Similar to H₂ but with asymmetric electron density.

molecules.name: Beryllium Hydride
molecules.description: Linear molecule with interesting electronic structure.
molecules.vqe_notes: Tests ability to handle more electrons. Good for symmetry studies.

categories.title: Small Polyatomic Molecules
categories.description: Three to four atom molecules with more complex bonding

molecules.name: Water
molecules.description: The molecule of life. Bent geometry with interesting correlation effects.
molecules.vqe_notes: Benchmark molecule. Active space of (8e,6o) captures most correlation.

molecules.name: Ammonia
molecules.description: Pyramidal geometry with nitrogen lone pair.
molecules.vqe_notes: C3v symmetry can be exploited. Interesting inversion dynamics.

molecules.name: Methane
molecules.vqe_notes: Td symmetry provides significant reduction. Good for C-H bond studies.

molecules.name: Hydrogen Fluoride
molecules.description: Strong polar bond with high electronegativity difference.
molecules.vqe_notes: Good test of polar bonding. Core electrons easily frozen.

molecules.name: Ethene
molecules.description: Simplest alkene with C=C double bond.
molecules.vqe_notes: Double bond requires (4e,4o) minimum active space.

molecules.name: 1,3-Butadiene
molecules.description: Conjugated diene with delocalized π system.
molecules.vqe_notes: π system requires (4e,4o). Full treatment needs active space.

molecules.name: Benzene
molecules.description: Aromatic ring with fully delocalized π electrons.
molecules.vqe_notes: π system (6e,6o) requires 12 qubits. D6h symmetry helps.

categories.title: Transition Metal Compounds
categories.description: Molecules with d-orbital involvement - challenging for classical methods

molecules.name: Iron Hydride
molecules.description: Simple transition metal compound with open d-shell.
molecules.vqe_notes: Requires proper treatment of 3d electrons. Strong correlation.

molecules.name: Chromium Oxide
molecules.vqe_notes: Challenging multiconfigurational character. Test of VQE power.

molecules.name: Salicylic Acid Core
molecules.description: Core structure of aspirin, simplified for VQE.
molecules.vqe_notes: Active space selection critical. Focus on carboxyl group.

molecules.name: Imidazole (Caffeine Core)
molecules.description: Core ring structure found in caffeine.
molecules.vqe_notes: Aromatic with nitrogen. Good for heterocyclic studies.
